      "1 hour from Zurich — close enough for a weekday recovery, distinct enough to feel like a trip"

      "The Tamina Gorge: a narrow Rhine tributary canyon with a historic spring source",
      "The town promenade and Grand Resort grounds",
      "One of Switzerland's cleanest and most relaxed day trip formats"
    ],

      "Very easy: spa town format — everything within easy walking distance of the station",
      "Tamina Gorge walk adds 1–2 hours of gentle outdoor walking"
    ],

      "Travellers looking for action or mountain adventure — this is recovery, not challenge",
